meta.title: About | Fernanda Haese
meta.description: Learn more about Fernanda Haese, her skills, tools, experience and education.

title: About Me
description: I am a Digital Designer with experience in UX/UI Design and Front-End development. I work on creating digital solutions from information research and structuring to interface design and implementation, combining visual design, user experience, and technologies such as React, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.

frontendDev.company: Programa Bolsa Futuro Digital | Prefeitura de Niterói
frontendDev.description: Participation in the development of the Brotaí program platform, working from requirements gathering to solution implementation, including data modeling, creation of interfaces focused on UX/UI, front-end development (React, TypeScript, HTML and CSS) and back-end development (Node.js, Prisma ORM and SQLite), as well as testing, validation and continuous product improvement.

digitalDesigner.description: Development of digital design projects for different segments, including websites, interfaces, visual identities and communication materials, working from requirements gathering to final delivery, focusing on UX/UI, information organization, visual design, project management and client relations.

react.institution: Digital Future Scholarship Program | MCTI and Softex

fiap.institution: Paulista Faculty of Informatics and Administration (FIAP)
